description: Contract governing the handoff of semantic atoms from the Semantic Buffer Module to the Principle Alignment Module.

id.description: Unique identifier for the semantic atom.

text.description: Non-empty normalized text of the semantic atom.

constraint_classes.description: Constraint class tags from CCE.constraint_classes. May be empty array.

source_intent_id.description: ID of the originating intent from IDE.

veil_level.description: Epistemic veil level assigned by CFC. 0 = fully transparent.

drift_score.description: Semantic drift score from CCE. 0.0 = no drift.

guarantees: metadata.constraint_classes is present (may be empty array).
metadata.source_intent_id is a valid IDE intent ID.
metadata.timestamp is a valid UTC ISO-8601 timestamp.
Atom id is globally unique within a session.

ATOM_TEXT_EMPTY.description: Atom text is empty or whitespace only.
ATOM_TEXT_EMPTY.escalation: Log and emit SBM_ERROR event. Do not forward to PAM.

MISSING_CONSTRAINT_CLASSES.escalation: Log and emit SBM_ERROR event. Do not forward to PAM.

INVALID_SOURCE_INTENT.description: metadata.source_intent_id does not reference a known IDE intent.
INVALID_SOURCE_INTENT.escalation: Log and emit SBM_ERROR event. Do not forward to PAM.

DRIFT_ABOVE_THRESHOLD.escalation: Forward to PAM with DRIFT_FLAGGED annotation. PAM must account for flag in PAIG evaluation.
